label: Server-side rendering is the default
summary: New routes render on the server unless explicitly marked client-only.

label: Routes are derived from the filesystem
summary: A file at routes/foo.ts becomes the /foo handler; no central route table.

label: Cache keys are content-addressed and immutable
summary: A cache key is a hash of content + varying headers; keys never mutate in place.

label: No global mutable state across requests
summary: Each request gets an isolated context; nothing is shared mutably between requests.

label: Sessions default to signed cookies
summary: Session state lives in a signed, HttpOnly cookie unless a server store is configured.
